news.title:
Edelweiss Alternatives plans to raise a $1B third infrastructure fund.
The fund aims to capitalize on growing investor appetite in the sector.
news.summary:
Edelweiss Alternatives plans to raise a $1B third infrastructure fund.
The fund aims to capitalize on growing investor appetite in the sector.

news.title:
Edelweiss sold a 4.4% stake in EAAA for ₹375 Cr, exceeding plans.
EAAA filed DRHP for IPO; AUM at ₹68,175 Cr, fee-paying AUM ₹41,920 Cr.
news.summary:
Edelweiss sold a 4.4% stake in EAAA for ₹375 Cr, exceeding plans.
EAAA filed DRHP for IPO; AUM at ₹68,175 Cr, fee-paying AUM ₹41,920 Cr.

news.title:
Edelweiss Financial Services confirms interest payment on NCDs on Feb 26, 2026.
Interest of Rs. 73.9L paid across three ISINs; no delays or payment issues reported.
news.summary:
Edelweiss Financial Services confirms interest payment on NCDs on Feb 26, 2026.
Interest of Rs. 73.9L paid across three ISINs; no delays or payment issues reported.

news.title: Edelweiss Financial approves ₹350 crore public NCD issue with greenshoe option.
news.summary: Edelweiss Financial approves ₹350 crore public NCD issue with greenshoe option.

news.title:
Edelweiss Financial Services approves public issue of secured NCDs worth ₹3,500M.
NCDs have tenors of 24-120 months, coupon rates at 8.65-10% p.a., rated A by CRISIL.
news.summary:
Edelweiss Financial Services approves public issue of secured NCDs worth ₹3,500M.
NCDs have tenors of 24-120 months, coupon rates at 8.65-10% p.a., rated A by CRISIL.

news.title:
Rashesh Shah raised his stake in Edelweiss Financial to 17.5% by acquiring 2 crore shares at ₹118 each.
Edelweiss reported net profit of ₹264 cr, revenue of ₹4,404.4 cr, and strong growth across AUM, SIP, and insurance segments.
news.summary:
Rashesh Shah raised his stake in Edelweiss Financial to 17.5% by acquiring 2 crore shares at ₹118 each.
Edelweiss reported net profit of ₹264 cr, revenue of ₹4,404.4 cr, and strong growth across AUM, SIP, and insurance segments.

news.title:
Edelweiss Financial's Q3 FY25 net sales rose 23% Y-o-Y to Rs. 129.44 cr; net profit surged 1926.3% to Rs. 187.03 cr.
EBITDA grew 184.6% Y-o-Y to Rs. 359.31 cr; EPS improved to Rs. 1.98 from Rs. 0.10. Stock returned 24.7% in 6 months.
news.summary:
Edelweiss Financial's Q3 FY25 net sales rose 23% Y-o-Y to Rs. 129.44 cr; net profit surged 1926.3% to Rs. 187.03 cr.
EBITDA grew 184.6% Y-o-Y to Rs. 359.31 cr; EPS improved to Rs. 1.98 from Rs. 0.10. Stock returned 24.7% in 6 months.

news.title:
Edelweiss Financial saw an NSE block trade of 10M shares at Rs 118.
The trade, conducted pre-open, totaled Rs 118 crore in value.
news.summary:
Edelweiss Financial saw an NSE block trade of 10M shares at Rs 118.
The trade, conducted pre-open, totaled Rs 118 crore in value.

news.title:
Edelweiss Financial Services posted strong Q3 FY26 results with net sales up 132.1% and net profit up 112.2%.
Concerns over operational efficiency, high taxes, and rising employee costs may pose sustainability challenges.
news.summary:
Edelweiss Financial Services posted strong Q3 FY26 results with net sales up 132.1% and net profit up 112.2%.
Concerns over operational efficiency, high taxes, and rising employee costs may pose sustainability challenges.

news.title:
Edelweiss AUM rose from $2.4B in Mar'20 to $7.6B in Dec'25.
Fee-paying AUM doubled to $4.7B; PAT jumped from $3M to $33M Mar'26.
news.summary:
Edelweiss AUM rose from $2.4B in Mar'20 to $7.6B in Dec'25.
Fee-paying AUM doubled to $4.7B; PAT jumped from $3M to $33M Mar'26.

news.title:
Edelweiss Financial Services divides operations into 7 business segments.
Underlying businesses achieved 28% CAGR PAT growth; key metrics include revenue, PAT, ROE, net worth, and debt.
news.summary:
Edelweiss Financial Services divides operations into 7 business segments.
Underlying businesses achieved 28% CAGR PAT growth; key metrics include revenue, PAT, ROE, net worth, and debt.

news.title:
Carlyle to invest ₹2,100 Cr in Nido Home Finance, acquiring 45% stake.
₹1,500 Cr primary infusion to boost growth; Nido manages ₹4,804 Cr assets.
news.summary:
Carlyle to invest ₹2,100 Cr in Nido Home Finance, acquiring 45% stake.
₹1,500 Cr primary infusion to boost growth; Nido manages ₹4,804 Cr assets.

news.title:
Edelweiss Financial announces ₹2,100 Cr deal for 45% Nido stake.
Post-transaction, Nido will cease to be Edelweiss subsidiary with ~73% ownership.
news.summary:
Edelweiss Financial announces ₹2,100 Cr deal for 45% Nido stake.
Post-transaction, Nido will cease to be Edelweiss subsidiary with ~73% ownership.

news.title:
Edelweiss Financial Services' 9-month PAT rose 45% YoY to INR 549 Cr.
Q3 PAT surged 74% YoY to INR 270 Cr; revenue driven by asset management, mutual funds, insurance.
news.summary:
Edelweiss Financial Services' 9-month PAT rose 45% YoY to INR 549 Cr.
Q3 PAT surged 74% YoY to INR 270 Cr; revenue driven by asset management, mutual funds, insurance.

news.title:
Edelweiss Financial Services reports 33% YoY growth in mutual fund AUM.
Alternative asset management AUM also sees a 33% YoY increase.
news.summary:
Edelweiss Financial Services reports 33% YoY growth in mutual fund AUM.
Alternative asset management AUM also sees a 33% YoY increase.

news.title:
Edelweiss Q3 EBITDA rises to 12B INR from 7.3B INR YOY.
EBITDA margin drops to 27.3% from 38.5% YOY.
news.summary:
Edelweiss Q3 EBITDA rises to 12B INR from 7.3B INR YOY.
EBITDA margin drops to 27.3% from 38.5% YOY.

news.title:
Edelweiss Financial shares surged 10.5% after strong Q3 results and ₹3,600 crore Carlyle investment boosted growth outlook.
Carlyle to acquire a majority stake in Nido Home Finance. Edelweiss' Q3 revenue grew 132% YoY; PAT up 74.1% to ₹270 crore.
news.summary:
Edelweiss Financial shares surged 10.5% after strong Q3 results and ₹3,600 crore Carlyle investment boosted growth outlook.
Carlyle to acquire a majority stake in Nido Home Finance. Edelweiss' Q3 revenue grew 132% YoY; PAT up 74.1% to ₹270 crore.

news.title:
Edelweiss Financial Services schedules an earnings call for Q3FY26 results on Feb 10, 2026, at 4 PM IST.
Details of the call, including dial-in and international toll-free numbers, are provided for investor participation.
news.summary:
Edelweiss Financial Services schedules an earnings call for Q3FY26 results on Feb 10, 2026, at 4 PM IST.
Details of the call, including dial-in and international toll-free numbers, are provided for investor participation.

news.title:
Edelweiss Financial Services completed interest and redemption payments for NCDs on January 28, 2026, as per SEBI regulations.
The total interest paid was Rs. 10.6 crore, and full redemption of Rs. 35.3 crore was executed for specific ISINs.
news.summary:
Edelweiss Financial Services completed interest and redemption payments for NCDs on January 28, 2026, as per SEBI regulations.
The total interest paid was Rs. 10.6 crore, and full redemption of Rs. 35.3 crore was executed for specific ISINs.

news.title:
Edelweiss subsidiary EAAA India Alternatives files DRHP for IPO.
Proposed sale up to ₹15,000M, facilitated by Edelweiss Securities & Investments.
news.summary:
Edelweiss subsidiary EAAA India Alternatives files DRHP for IPO.
Proposed sale up to ₹15,000M, facilitated by Edelweiss Securities & Investments.
